ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the episode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was last updated */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review provided by the user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the feedback helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode for which the rating is calculated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the episode */,
  "total_feedback" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries for the episode */,
  "top_rated_by" TEXT /* Users who have given the highest ratings */,
  "bottom_rated_by" TEXT /* Users who have given the lowest ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback log entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related feedback entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken with the feedback (e.g., submitted, updated) */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_logs_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode associated with the genre */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_genres_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback associated with the flag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who raised the flag */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for raising the flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_flags_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
